evidence_summary: Phase 5 qualification-promotion-learning convergence achieved across four bounded commits. Gate-chain retained-edit evidence from stage3_manager traces is summarized (summarize_gate_chain), made a hard qualification gate (gate_chain_ready in evaluate_v8_gates), wired into the promotion gate matrix blocking both candidate and stage6 promote actions when evidence is insufficient, and elevated to a first-class named subsystem (gate_chain in evaluate_subsystems, _preview_decision core_ready, and manifest promotion_policy.criteria). The gate_chain_min_full_qualification_rate threshold is manifest-driven. 98 tests passing at c280cb6. Phase 5 objective achieved.
